name: Building New House
description: It's your turn to run the most fabulous handyman’s workshop. Customers want to order your products and services. You can do activities like digging the soil, building or demolishing houses and towers, constructing wood products, cutting wood, welding, and other fun things. Make what children ordered using different building materials, tools, and machines to achieve the most outstanding results. Have fun!
tags: Boy, Boys, Crazy, Fun, H5, House, HTML5, Kid, Kids
